name: @e2e-loop/workspace
description: e2e-loop monorepo workspace root. 不发布到 registry, 仅作为 npm workspaces 协调点.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @e2e-loop/shared && npm run build -w @e2e-loop/ssot && npm run build -w @e2e-loop/adapter-claude-code && npm run build -w @e2e-loop/adapter-opencode && npm run build -w @e2e-loop/cli
